calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-12-292513 In Re: Catherine R. DeMartini Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Thomas DeMartini. Lawrence Siracusa for Elizabeth Adler.

The Petition for Probate of Will was taken off calendar. Ms. Calhoun will file a dismissal. The Court epxressed concern with regard to the new fee petition. Ms. Calhoun and Mr. Siracusa addressed the issue of fees. The Petition for Instructions in the Trust matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Continued To Aug-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-09-292513 In Re: Catherine DeMartini Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Elizabeth Adler. Brian McCaffrey for Elizabeth Adler. Emilie Calhoun for and with Thomas DeMartini.

Mr. McCaffrey's fee petition was taken under submission. The Court stated that it does not see the need to probate the will, and that the assets are in the Trust and that's where fees should be considered. Ms. Calhoun's fee petition in the Trust matter with respect to the $26,000.00 amount was continued to June 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Calhoun to determine if she will provide copies of billing records for in camera review and will be taken under submission on that date (no appearance will be required). The probate matter was continued to August 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Calhoun is to amend her fee petition in the Trust matter to include the $36,000.00 amount or file a new petition in the Trust matter for that amount. The new fee petition is to be set with a hearing of August 7, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To Jun-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Thomas DeMartini. Paul DeMartini in Propria Persona.

The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to June 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. DeMartini to provide further briefing on the necessity of opening an Estate to preserve a claim.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne/J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To May-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
